service_description: Australia's first nationally-oriented counselling and referral service for LGBTIQ+ people. Provides anonymous phone and web chat support.
24-hour crisis support and suicide prevention services. LGBTIQ+ trained counsellors available on request.
Mental health support and resources with specific LGBTIQ+ programs including LGBTIQ+ support forums and tailored resources.
Peer-based support, information and referral for LGBTIQ+ Victorians. Rainbow Door crisis support service.
Comprehensive health and wellbeing services for LGBTIQ+ communities including HIV services, counselling, and community programs.
Australia's first purpose-built LGBTIQ+ community hub. Hosts community events, provides spaces for LGBTIQ+ organisations.
NSW's largest LGBTIQ+ health organisation providing HIV services, mental health support, domestic violence services, and advocacy.
Support services for LGBTIQ+ young people aged 12-25 including housing, counselling, case management and groups.
Free legal advice and representation for LGBTIQ+ people in NSW. Specialises in discrimination, family law, and criminal matters.
Dedicated police liaison officers for LGBTIQ+ community. Report hate crimes, get support, community engagement.
LGBTIQ+ health and wellbeing organisation providing HIV services, counselling, community programs and advocacy.
Support services for LGBTIQ+ young people aged 12-24 including counselling, case management, housing support and social groups.
Dedicated police liaison officers for LGBTIQ+ community in Queensland. Safe reporting pathways for hate crimes.
Western Australia's LGBTIQ+ health and wellbeing organisation. Counselling, support groups, advocacy and community programs.
Drop-in centre and support services for LGBTIQ+ young people aged 12-25 in Perth including counselling and social activities.
Dedicated LGBTIQ+ police liaison officers in Western Australia. Safe reporting and support for hate crime victims.
Tasmania's LGBTIQ+ health and wellbeing organisation. Counselling, support groups, training and community development.
South Australia's LGBTIQ+ support service providing counselling, peer support groups, and community programs.
Sexual health and relationship services with specific LGBTIQ+ programs including counselling and community education.
ACT's LGBTIQ+ community organisation providing peer support, community events, and advocacy.
Support services for trans, gender diverse and intersex people in the ACT and surrounding region.
Support and advocacy for LGBTIQ+ families and people considering parenthood. Resources, events and community connection.
Peer support, information and advocacy for intersex people and their families. Policy reform and community education.
Support for transgender children, young people and their families. Peer support groups, resources and advocacy.
Online mental health support for young people including specific LGBTIQ+ resources and peer support forums.
Youth mental health services with LGBTIQ+ inclusive centres. Free counselling for young people aged 12-25.
